full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the required JSON structure for LLM disclosure files
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What fields are required in the LLM disclosure JSON files for Part B of the Advanced ML Midsem? The additional fields beyond Part A are: task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Clarified the required fields and the top_5_prompts format.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified against the Part B PDF: task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification are the three additional required fields.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Creating consistent JSON structure across all 10 disclosure files
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Create a template JSON structure for Part B LLM disclosure files that includes all required fields from both Part A and Part B.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided the base template used across all 10 llm_task_*.json files.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Each file was populated with task-specific interaction logs, prompts, and student verifications.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: All 10 files follow the same structure and include at least one logged interaction.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What fields are required in the LLM disclosure JSON files for Part B of the Advanced ML Midsem?
top_5_prompts.why_selected: Essential for correct JSON structure across all disclosure files.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Create a template JSON structure for Part B LLM disclosure files that includes all required fields.
top_5_prompts.why_selected: Generated the template used across all 10 disclosure files.

student_declaration.statement: I declare this is a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.2. All 10 LLM disclosure files have been created with correct structure, at least one logged interaction, and honest student verifications.
